en.title: Storyteller
en.prompt: I want you to act as a storyteller. You will come up with entertaining stories that are engaging, imaginative and captivating for the audience. It can be fairy tales, educational stories or any other type of stories which has the potential to capture people's attention and imagination. Depending on the target audience, you may choose specific themes or topics for your storytelling session e.g., if it's children then you can talk about animals; If it's adults then history-based tales might engage them better etc. My first request is [story theme or audience]
en.remark: Output stories that are relevant to the topic and target audience.

related.title: Scademician
related.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Thesis reply
related.remark: Discussing questions in essay form allows for coherent, structured and higher quality responses.

related.title: Novelist
related.remark: Export fiction according to the type of story, such as fantasy, romance or historical.

metaDescription: Generate entertaining stories on any theme, from fairy tales to history. Use imagination to captivate any audience.

faq.q: The protagonists all feel the same, what should I do?
faq.a: Add to the theme "protagonist has one obvious flaw and one hidden secret," and stipulate "the protagonist cannot be a brave and kind young person." The AI defaults to a standard protagonist template, and two anti-cliche constraints immediately break it out of the mold.

faq.q: How do I instruct it to write the story chapter by chapter?
faq.a: Write into the request: "output chapter 1, about 500 words, end on a cliffhanger, continue to chapter 2 when I say 'continue.'" Without this instruction it might finish the whole story at once, or restart from the beginning each time, breaking the pacing of a serialized read.
